test_cases.input_summary: State public records request to Virginia DEQ for poultry facility enforcement records — residency-restricted state, non-resident journalist
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Zero tells; the fee waiver section's honest acknowledgment that Virginia has no specific journalist provision is strong genre craft.

test_cases.input_summary: Redaction analysis of DOJ domestic surveillance records with (b)(1), (b)(5), (b)(7)(E) exemptions and two Glomar categories — compiled official acknowledgment evidence available
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: One minor structural tell — parallel 'Challenge if/on' constructions across three exemptions create slightly mechanical cadence; Glomar section breaks the pattern effectively.

test_cases.input_summary: Administrative appeal for constructive denial — CDC non-response to health surveillance records request, 20-business-day deadline expired with no acknowledgment
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Zero tells; the 'Basis for Appeal' em dash turn ('not diminished — heightened') is controlled editorial craft, using the device once for genuine rhetorical force.

prior_eval.note: v1.0 eval used 6 dimensions (no Editorial Naturalness). Direct comparison is approximate.
